hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'pm2 restart ecosystem.config.js' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Deploy detected. If this deploy added/removed/renamed a source file, route, lib module, Supabase table, or PM2 process, update PROJECT_MAP.md now per the project-map skill (bump version, add a changelog row). If only behavior changed, no map update is needed."}}' || true
